INTRVNS_MDCTN_OTHR_ADMSN_CD Other: IV - Other (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving other IV medications. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
606 INTRVNS_MDCTN_OTHR_DSCHRG_CD INTRVNS_MDCTN_OTHR_DSCHRG_CD Other: IV - Other (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving other IV medications. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
607 TRNSFSN_ADMSN_CD
